nasb.text: The angel answered and said to him, “I am Gabriel, who stands in the presence of God, and I have been sent to speak to you and to bring you this good news.

esv.text: And the angel answered him, “I am Gabriel. I stand in the presence of God, and I was sent to speak to you and to bring you this good news.

cnv.text: 天使回答：“我是站在　神面前的加百列，奉差遣向你說話，報給你這好消息。

ccb.text: 天使回答说：“我是侍立在上帝面前的加百列，奉命来向你报这喜讯。

csbs.text: 天使回答他，说：“我是站在神面前的加百列，奉差派来对你说话，向你传达这些好消息。
